[Call between Nancy White (GreenLeaf Office Supplies) and Sarah Chen (Meridian Corp)]
[March 01, 2026, 13:00]

Nancy White: Hey Sarah, calling about PO-0160. We had a counting issue at the warehouse and we're going to be short on the quantity.

Sarah Chen: How short?

Sarah Chen: Just ship what you have and invoice for what you send. We'll do a separate PO for the backorder.

[Call between Rachel Gomez (Meridian Corp) and Diane Chang (MedSupply Corp)]
[February 16, 2026, 15:15]

Diane Chang: Hi Rachel, this is Diane from MedSupply Corp. Got a minute?

Rachel Gomez: Sure, what's up?

Diane Chang: It's about your order PO-0081, the 750 units of Nitrile Exam Gloves Standard Box/100. We've got a stock situation — I can only do about 600 of the Standard right now.

Rachel Gomez: That's a problem. We need the full quantity.

Diane Chang: I know, that's why I'm calling. I can make up the difference with our Surgical version. It's actually better quality. Runs $16.00 per unit instead of $9.50.

Rachel Gomez: What's that come to for the total order?

Diane Chang: So 600 at $9.50 plus 150 at $16.00. Comes to about $7,612.50 total instead of $7,125.00.

Rachel Gomez: That's fine. Go ahead and ship it.

Diane Chang: Perfect, I'll get that out today. Thanks Rachel.

[Call ended]

[February 09, 2026, 11:15]

Wendy Brooks: Hi Rachel, I'm calling about your order PO-0163 for 400 units of Work Uniforms.

Wendy Brooks: That's right, 50 units short on this shipment. Your invoice INV-0163 will reflect the 350 units actually delivered. The remaining 50 will ship on backorder.
